lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਿ ਕਪਟਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਜੋ ਬੀਜੈ ਖਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: koorr kapatt kinai na paaeo jo beejai khaavai soe |3|
lines.english: By falsehood and deception, none have found Him. Whatever you plant, you shall eat. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਕਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਮਨਿ ਕੋਰੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sehas siaanap kar rahe man korai rang na hoe |
lines.english: Thousands of clever mental tricks have been tried, but still, the raw and undisciplined mind does not absorb the Color of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਧਹੁ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਦਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh tudhahu khaalee ko nahee dar guramukhaa no saabaas |
lines.english: O God, none return from You empty-handed; at Your Door, the Gurmukhs are praised and acclaimed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਆਸ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂੰ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa teree aas prabh sabh jeea tere toon raas |
lines.english: O God, You are the Hope of all. All beings are Yours; You are the Wealth of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਭਉਜਲ ਡੁਬਦੇ ਕਢਿ ਲੈ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੪॥੧॥੬੫॥
lines.translit: bikh bhaujal ddubade kadt lai jan naanak kee aradaas |4|1|65|
lines.english: In the terrifying world-ocean of poison, people are drowning-please lift them up and save them! This is servant Nanak's humble prayer. ||4||1||65||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਮੈ ਦਸੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: koee guramukh sajan je milai mai dase prabh gunataas |
lines.english: If I meet the Gurmukh, my Spiritual Friend, he will show me God, the Treasure of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam milai man tripateeai bin naamai dhrig jeevaas |
lines.english: Receiving the Naam, the mind is satisfied; without the Naam, life is cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਚਉ ਖੰਨੀਐ ਮੈ ਨਾਮ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hau tis vittahu chau khaneeai mai naam kare paragaas |1|
lines.english: I am every bit a sacrifice to one who reveals to me the Naam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਹਉ ਜੀਵਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere preetamaa hau jeevaa naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my Beloved, I live by meditating on Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam amolak ratan hai poore satigur paas |
lines.english: The Naam is a Priceless Jewel; it is with the Perfect True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਨਾ ਥੀਐ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai jeevan naa theeai mere satigur naam drirraae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without Your Name, my life does not even exist. My True Guru has implanted the Naam within me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੈ ਲਗਿਆ ਕਢਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਪਰਗਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevai lagiaa kadt ratan devai paragaas |
lines.english: When one is enjoined to serve the True Guru, He brings out this Jewel and bestows this enlightenment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਆ ਜੋ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan vaddabhaagee vaddabhaageea jo aae mile gur paas |2|
lines.english: Blessed, and most fortunate of the very fortunate, are those who come to meet the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਸੇ ਭਾਗਹੀਣ ਵਸਿ ਕਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur purakh na bhettio se bhaagaheen vas kaal |
lines.english: Those who have not met the Primal Being, the True Guru, are most unfortunate, and are subject to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਭਵਾਈਅਹਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਕਰਿ ਵਿਕਰਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: oe fir fir jon bhavaaeeeh vich visattaa kar vikaraal |
lines.english: They wander in reincarnation over and over again, as the most disgusting maggots in manure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਪਾਸਿ ਦੁਆਸਿ ਨ ਭਿਟੀਐ ਜਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਚੰਡਾਲ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: onaa paas duaas na bhitteeai jin antar krodh chanddaal |3|
lines.english: Do not meet with, or even approach those people, whose hearts are filled with horrible anger. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਵਹਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh amrit sar vaddabhaagee naaveh aae |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, is the Pool of Ambrosial Nectar. The very fortunate ones come to bathe in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਮੈਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aun janam janam kee mail utarai niramal naam drirraae |
lines.english: The filth of many incarnations is washed away, and the Immaculate Naam is implanted within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਉਤਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੨॥੬੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak utam pad paaeaa satigur kee liv laae |4|2|66|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has obtained the most exalted state, lovingly attuned to the True Guru. ||4||2||66||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਗੁਣਕਾਰੀਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਜਣ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sajan gunakaareea mil sajan har gun gaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs, my spiritual friends, bestow virtue. Meeting with my spiritual friends, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਗੁਣ ਵਿਥਰਾ ਗੁਣ ਬੋਲੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavaa gun vitharaa gun bolee meree maae |
lines.english: I sing His Glories, I describe His Glories, I speak of His Glories, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਰੈ ਹੀਰੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: heerai heer mil bedhiaa rang chaloolai naae |1|
lines.english: The Diamond of the Guru has pierced the diamond of my mind, which is now dyed in the deep crimson color of the Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere govindaa gun gaavaa tripat man hoe |
lines.english: O my Lord of the Universe, singing Your Glorious Praises, my mind is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar piaas har naam kee gur tus milaavai soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Within me is the thirst for the Lord's Name; may the Guru, in His Pleasure, grant it to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਰੰਗਹੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਹੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਕਰੇ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man rangahu vaddabhaageeho gur tutthaa kare pasaau |
lines.english: Let your minds be imbued with His Love, O blessed and fortunate ones. By His Pleasure, the Guru bestows His Gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਲਖ ਕੋਟੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin satigur har naam na labhee lakh kottee karam kamaau |2|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the Name of the Lord is not found, even though people may perform hundreds of thousands, even millions of rituals. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਹਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur naam drirraae rang siau hau satigur kai bal jaau |
lines.english: The Guru has lovingly implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within me; I am a sacrifice to the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਨਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠਿਆ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨਿਤ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin bhaagaa satigur naa milai ghar baitthiaa nikatt nit paas |
lines.english: Without destiny, the True Guru is not found, even though He sits within the home of our own inner being, always near and close at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਨਾ ਥੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਲੋਹੁ ਬੂਡਾ ਬੇੜੀ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette kanchan naa theeai manamukh lohu booddaa berree paas |3|
lines.english: Without meeting with the True Guru, no one is transformed into gold. The self-willed manmukh sinks like iron, while the boat is very close. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਹੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਪੜਦਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਪਈਆਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar agiaan dukh bharam hai vich parradaa door peeaas |
lines.english: There is ignorance within, and the pain of doubt, like a separating screen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਬੋਹਿਥ ਬੈਠਾ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai jo chalai vich bohith baitthaa aae |
lines.english: One who walks in harmony with the True Guru's Will comes to sit in this Boat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਵ ਹੈ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਚੜਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bohith har naav hai kit bidh charriaa jaae |
lines.english: The Boat of the True Guru is the Name of the Lord. How can we climb on board?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੩॥੬੭॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan vaddabhaagee naanakaa jinaa satigur le milaae |4|3|67|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed are those very fortunate ones, O Nanak, who are united with the Lord through the True Guru. ||4||3||67||
